requirements.fulltext: if autopilot & preBool(false,autopilot) & preBool(false,limits) FSM shall immediately satisfy pullup

semantics.pre_condition: (autopilot & preBool ( false , autopilot ) & preBool ( false , limits ))
semantics.regular_condition: (autopilot & preBool ( false , autopilot ) & preBool ( false , limits ))
semantics.diagramVariables: TC = (autopilot & preBool ( false , autopilot ) & preBool ( false , limits )), Response = (pullup).
semantics.description:
SCOPE: in the interval defined by the entire execution.
TRIGGER: first point in the interval if (autopilot & preBool ( false , autopilot ) & preBool ( false , limits )) is true and any point in the interval where (autopilot & preBool ( false , autopilot ) & preBool ( false , limits )) becomes true (from false).
REQUIRED BEHAVIOR: for every trigger, if trigger holds then (pullup) also holds at the same time point.
semantics.probabilistic_description:
SCOPE: in the interval defined by the entire execution.
TRIGGER: first point in the interval if (autopilot & preBool ( false , autopilot ) & preBool ( false , limits )) is true and any point in the interval where (autopilot & preBool ( false , autopilot ) & preBool ( false , limits )) becomes true (from false).
REQUIRED BEHAVIOR: for every trigger, with probability >=1, if trigger holds then (pullup) also holds at the same time point.

requirements.fulltext: FSM  shall  always  satisfy (limits & !standby & !apfail & supported) => pullup

semantics.diagramVariables: Response = (( limits & ! standby & ! apfail & supported ) => pullup).
semantics.description:
SCOPE: in the interval defined by the entire execution.
TRIGGER: first point in the interval.
REQUIRED BEHAVIOR: for every trigger, (( limits & ! standby & ! apfail & supported ) => pullup) must hold at all time points between (and including) the trigger and the end of the interval.
semantics.probabilistic_description:
SCOPE: in the interval defined by the entire execution.
TRIGGER: first point in the interval.
REQUIRED BEHAVIOR: for every trigger, with probability >=1, (( limits & ! standby & ! apfail & supported ) => pullup) must hold at all time points between (and including) the trigger and the end of the interval.
semantics.CoCoSpecCode: H(((((limits and not (standby)) and not (apfail)) and supported) => pullup))
